data.title: create-dso-app.sh: colima start fails with 'docker not found' despite colima being installed
data.description:
## Incident Overview
When running create-dso-app.sh, colima is installed successfully via brew but then immediately fails to start with 'FATA[0003] dependency check failed for docker: docker not found, run brew install docker to install'. This is misleading because colima provides Docker and the docker CLI should be installed alongside it, or the script should detect colima's own Docker socket.

## Observed behavior
```
Starting Colima...
INFO[0003] starting colima
INFO[0003] runtime: docker
FATA[0003] dependency check failed for docker: docker not found, run 'brew install docker' to install
WARNING: Colima installed but could not be started automatically — run 'colima start' manually if container features are needed.
All dependencies satisfied.
```

## Expected behavior
Either: (a) install docker CLI alongside colima, or (b) detect that colima is the Docker runtime and skip the docker binary check, or (c) provide accurate guidance that 'brew install docker' is needed in addition to colima.
